title: Intel 3rd Annual NDA Industry Analyst Business & Technology Summit — 'Labs, Fab and Gab' (Peter Kastner Personal Agenda)
author: Intel Corporation (Peter S. Kastner, attendee, Scott-Page Associates)
abstract: Peter Kastner's personalized two-day agenda for Intel's 3rd Annual NDA Industry Analyst Business & Technology Summit ('Labs, Fab and Gab'), held Feb 24-25, 2009 at Intel's Ronler Acres 3 (RA3) and Jones Farm Conference Center (JFCC) campuses in Hillsboro OR. Kastner attending as Scott-Page Associates. Day 1 includes exec briefings by Sean Maloney, William Holt, Andy Bryant, Kirk Skaugen, Rob Crooke, and Chuck Mulloy; D1D fab window tour; cocktail reception at McMenamins Cornelius Pass Roadhouse. Day 2 includes Microprocessor Validation Lab, vPro Technology Lab, and DataCenter lights-out tours; keynote by Justin Rattner; lunch with Peter Cleveland; breakouts on Notebook Strategies, Larrabee Programmability, and Mobile Internet Platforms.
importance_rationale: Primary artifact of Kastner's post-Aberdeen analyst-relations activity with Intel during the Nehalem/Larrabee/vPro era. Documents Intel executive lineup and 2009 roadmap themes at first-tier analyst access level.
relevance_rationale: Historical event; naming of Intel leaders and product programs (Larrabee, Atom-era Mobile Internet, vPro) remains a reference datapoint for industry historians.
prescience_rationale: Schedule document rather than predictive analysis; prescience not-applicable to the document itself, though content alludes to Larrabee (discontinued 2010) and MIDs (supplanted by smartphones/tablets).
